final:
module bluetooth_module (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire conn_req,
    output reg connected
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            connected <= 0;
        end else if (conn_req) begin
            connected <= 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
